theory.technical_interpretation: UnifiedEvolutionEquation is a hamiltonian construction, written iħ(∂)/(partialt)|Ψ_total⟩= [H_gyro+ H_tunnel+H_photon+H_coupling ]|Ψ_ total⟩. It defines a Hamiltonian that generates the system's time evolution and encodes its energy. It is built from H, g, y, r, o, u, defining iħ(∂)/(partialt)|Ψ_total⟩. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
